bodyPreview: Discover the rich tapestry of your genetic heritage with our World Ancestry Report! Immerse yourself in the fascinating journey of your unique genetic makeup, exploring the intricate threads that connect you to our shared human story. Through cutting-edge DNA technology and advanced statistical analysis, our app unveils the stories written in your genes. Uncover the shared ancestry that binds you with others worldwide, celebrating both your individuality and our collective human community. Powered By Advanced Genetic Genealogy Algorithms G-Nomix: High Resolution Ancestry Deconvolution G-Nomix is a local ancestry algorithm (LAI) that accurately assigns ancestry labels to DNA segments from large biobanks using whole genome or SNP array data. It's based on our custom engineered machine learning (ML) models trained with thousands of genomic sequences from people around the world. G-Nomix is able to detect multiple ancestry segments with high resolution by extracting genomic patterns using machine learning. By combining classification and error correction stages, G-Nomix provides highly accurate ancestry predictions that outperform existing methods.

infoTabs.label: Overview
infoTabs.textPreview: Discover the rich tapestry of your genetic heritage with our World Ancestry Report! Immerse yourself in the fascinating journey of your unique genetic makeup, exploring the intricate threads that connect you to our shared human story. Through cutting-edge DNA technology and advanced statistical analysis, our app unveils the stories written in your genes. Uncover the shared ancestry that binds you with others worldwide, celebrating both your individuality and our collective human community. Powered By Advanced Genetic Genealogy Algorithms G-Nomix: High Resolution Ancestry Deconvolution G-Nomix is a local ancestry algorithm (LAI) that accurately assigns ancestry labels to DNA segments from large biobanks using whole genome or SNP array data. It's based on our custom engineered machine learning (ML) models trained with thousands of genomic sequences from people around the world. G-Nomix is able to detect multiple ancestry segments with high resolution by extracting genomic patterns using machine learning. By combining classification and error correction stages, G-Nomix provides highly accurate ancestry predictions that outperform existing methods.

infoTabs.label: FAQ
infoTabs.textPreview: What Consistutes our World Ancestry Report? A: The World Ancestry Report is a cutting-edge genetic ancestry estimation service provided by Galatea Bio that analyzes your DNA to provide insights into your ancestral origins. Our proprietary algorithm examines key genetic markers to generate a detailed breakdown of your ancestry, revealing information about your heritage and genetic background. How does our genetic ancestry estimation service work? A: Our World Ancestry Report is generated by state-of-the-art DNA analysis technology. After uploading your DNA sequence data, our platform examines specific genetic markers to infer your ancestry. Our algorithms compare your genetic data to a reference panel of diverse human populations to estimate the proportions of different ancestral components in your DNA. How accurate is the ancestry estimation? A: World Ancestry Report strives for high accuracy by leveraging a comprehensive reference panel and advanced algorithms. However, it's important to note that ancestry estimation involves probabilities, and results may be influenced by factors like the diversity of your genetic background and the reference panel used. Can I trust the results?

infoTabs.label: Disclaimer
infoTabs.textPreview: The genetic analysis and statements that appear in this app and report have not been evaluated by the United States Food and Drug Administration. The Sequencing.com website and all software applications (apps) and reports that use Sequencing.com's website, as well as Sequencing.com's Application Programming Interface (API), are not intended to diagnose, monitor, treat, cure, prevent nor alleviate any disease.
